---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for KushCloud
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem / motivation**
What problem does this solve, or what would it improve?

**Proposed solution**
Describe what you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you've thought about.

**Acceptance criteria**
What would make this feature complete?
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

**Additional context**
Mock-ups, references to similar games, etc.

**Checklist**
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have reviewed the project roadmap (if available)
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature if approved
